Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

35 
BLOOD_ADMIN_CHRG_AMT 
LABEL: 
Blood storage and processing charge amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for blood storage and processing related to the 
beneficiary's stay. 
SHORT NAME: BLDADMIN 
LONG NAME: BLOOD_ADMIN_CHRG_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total
